headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), accelerometer=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=()

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://open.spotify.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com; frame-ancestors 'none'
